representative_excerpts.text: [15:21:08] Okay, Tyler look at these pictures and tell me what is happening
representative_excerpts.context: This excerpt demonstrates the initial prompt given to the child to engage with visual stimuli and provide a verbal response.

representative_excerpts.text: [15:21:10] Okay Tyler tell me the story that you see in these hatches
representative_excerpts.context: This excerpt shows a follow-up question aimed at eliciting a narrative from the child based on the visual images presented.
This brief exchange indicates the child’s response to a specific part of the visual stimulus, showing how the child can provide concise answers.
